title: borbonia sphaerica
intro: Borbonia sphaerica, also known as the Black Rose or Night-blooming Jasmine, is a species of flowering plant native to the Caribbean islands. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Borbonia sphaerica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, and are often used to treat various health issues.
